title: NEXTAUTH_URL must be the base domain only (e.g. https://www.wheelwright.ai) — Ne
rationale: Setting NEXTAUTH_URL to the full callback path caused every OAuth attempt to generate malformed redirect_uri values, making it impossible to complete sign-in.
description: NEXTAUTH_URL must be the base domain only (e.g. https://www.wheelwright.ai) — NextAuth constructs /api/auth/callback/[provider] automatically. Setting the full callback path breaks all OAuth flows.
